name: Oh Dear Website Monitoring API
what_it_does: Comprehensive website monitoring platform with REST API — enabling developers to monitor website uptime, SSL certificate expiry, broken links, mixed content, DNS changes, domain expiry, scheduled jobs (cron monitoring), and performance metrics, with a developer-friendly API and notification integrations, built by the Spatie team (Laravel ecosystem).
use_cases: Monitoring website uptime via Oh Dear API for automated incident alerting
Tracking SSL certificate expiry via Oh Dear for proactive renewal reminders
Scanning for broken links via Oh Dear API for website quality assurance
Monitoring cron jobs via Oh Dear Cron API for scheduled task failure detection
Tracking DNS changes via Oh Dear API for infrastructure change detection
not_for: Application performance monitoring (use Datadog or New Relic for full APM)
Complex incident management with on-call rotation (use PagerDuty for escalation policies)
Large-scale infrastructure monitoring (Oh Dear is website/endpoint-focused)
best_when: A Laravel/PHP developer or small-medium team needs comprehensive website monitoring beyond just uptime — where Oh Dear combines uptime, SSL, broken links, DNS, and cron job monitoring in a single developer-friendly API.
avoid_when: You need full APM, complex escalation policies, or infrastructure-level monitoring.

auth.notes: API token via Authorization: Bearer header. Token generated in Oh Dear account settings. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes. Webhooks for monitoring events (uptime changes, SSL issues, etc.). PHP SDK by Spatie. Cron monitoring via ping URL (no auth in URL, ping token embedded).

pricing.paid_tiers: Small €9/month (5 sites); Standard €19/month (20 sites); Professional €39/month (50 sites); Business €99/month (150 sites)
pricing.notes: Belgian company (Antwerp). Founded 2017 by Freek Van der Herten and Mattias Geniar (both Spatie team). Bootstrapped profitable. Spatie is well-known Laravel package ecosystem company. Very developer-friendly (Spatie reputation). Laravel community favorite. Features: uptime (1-min intervals), SSL expiry, broken links, DNS, domain expiry, cron, scheduled tasks, mixed content, lighthouse performance. 4,000+ customers. Notification channels: email, Slack, Teams, SMS, Webhooks, PagerDuty, OpsGenie. PHP client library (open source). Excellent developer documentation. OpenAPI spec available.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with Bearer token. PHP SDK (Spatie). Webhooks. GDPR compliant. Belgian company. No OAuth2. Excellent developer documentation. 10-day free trial. Multi-feature monitoring (uptime, SSL, DNS, broken links, cron).
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Site reads idempotent by site ID. Check reads idempotent by check ID. Site creation: check for existing before creating. Cron ping idempotent for same ping key.
known_agent_gotchas: Site ID in API — distinct from domain name; list sites first to get IDs
Multiple check types per site (uptime, SSL, broken links, DNS) — each has separate check_id
Cron monitoring uses ping URL (separate from main API key) — similar to Healthchecks.io pattern
Webhook events are signed — verify X-OhDear-Signature header to prevent spoofing
Belgian/EU company and hosting — GDPR applies by default
PHP SDK is the best-supported client — use it if PHP is available

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. Belgian company (EU). Bearer token auth. Webhook signature validation (X-OhDear-Signature). No OAuth2 scope granularity. Bootstrapped by Spatie (security-conscious open source community). Monitoring endpoint URLs/IPs are non-sensitive — monitoring data is about availability, not user data.
